vocab.meaning: sự cải thiện/mở rộng không gian
vocab.example: I purchased a large wall mirror primarily for spatial enhancement in my rather cramped studio apartment.

vocab.meaning: vật trung tâm, điểm nhấn chính
vocab.example: I recently acquired a sunburst mirror to serve as the centerpiece of my living room wall.

vocab.meaning: phong cách hiện đại, tinh tế
vocab.example: The frameless mirrors I bought last month add a touch of contemporary flair to the bathroom.

vocab.meaning: sự khéo léo của nghệ nhân
vocab.example: I was drawn to that particular mirror because of the exquisite artisan craftsmanship visible in its hand-carved wood.
I invested in a high-end vanity mirror that offers high-definition clarity for skincare routines.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp mộc mạc, bình dị
vocab.example: I once bought a mirror with a reclaimed oak frame to bring some rustic charm into my bedroom.

vocab.meaning: chiều sâu về mặt thị giác
vocab.example: Placing mirrors opposite the windows was a strategic move to create more visual depth in the hallway.

vocab.meaning: người am hiểu, người sành sỏi
vocab.example: While I’m no connoisseur of home furnishings, I did spend a lot of time selecting the perfect mirror for my foyer.

vocab.meaning: hình dáng hình học (vuông, tròn, lục giác...)
vocab.example: I prefer mirrors with a bold geometric silhouette to break the monotony of the plain walls.
After buying the mirror, I spent hours experimenting with optimal placement to catch the afternoon sun.
